rationale: X directly reconstructs the ground-truth reviewer's actual reasoning (both submit_initial and submit_update reject list prompts regardless of already_submitted, so the fix is correct and consistent), verifying it against stage_pool.py line numbers rather than just speculating. Y raises a superficially similar orchestrator.py point but misreads it as an unresolved len>1 bug requiring REQUEST CHANGES, contradicting the actual merged/approved outcome, and its output is contaminated with duplicated review_text blocks and fabricated, unrelated blockers (db/init.sql, '200_status feature', iteration limits) that have nothing to do with this PR, severely undermining precision.
